title: Iran-backed hackers breach FBI director Kash Patel's personal emails
summary_full: A hacker group shares Patel's purported resume and photos - information, the FBI says, is "historical in nature".
summary_public: A hacker group shares Patel's purported resume and photos - information, the FBI says, is "historical in nature".

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran-backed hackers breach FBI director Kash Patel's personal emails
